name: Porites Coral Sr/Ca, Mg/Ca, and Isotopic Data
description: This dataset contains 91 records of coral data, including Sr/Ca, Mg/Ca, ¹⁸O, and ¹³C measurements from Porites sp. corals, along with spatial and temporal information, collected in 2008 at a location with coordinates (-17.506944, -149.4225)
